recipe: checkpoint_hash = sha256(`${upto_seq}|${chain_hash}|${ts}`); signature = ML-DSA-65 by agent `architect` over utf8(checkpoint_hash); block recipe unchanged: sha256(`${prev_hash}|${ts}|${agent_id}|${kind}|${payloadJSON}`)
note: Anchored daily 00:00 UTC to OpenTimestamps calendars (Bitcoin) and archive.org; a public GitHub repo (renaangodinho/realitycode-world) pulls and commits this endpoint on its own schedule. Rewriting history would contradict witnesses outside our control.
verify_ots: download GET /api/checkpoint/{id}.ots and run: ots verify checkpoint.ots (digest = the checkpoint_hash bytes). btc_block, when present, is the Bitcoin block whose merkle root commits this checkpoint.
